what_it_does: This file is an attachment ledger entry for the design-assets channel; it records metadata that links attachment id att-7d8d6eba to the image asset at image://design-assets/icons/Square_Meters and stores the addition timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: The target URI points to a specific icon named Square_Meters under design-assets/icons
File is purely metadata with no prose or code body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
References an asset via an image:// URI scheme
Includes an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
concerns: No body content or human-readable description beyond metadata fields
Target URI does not indicate image format or dimensions
notes: This is a minimal attachment ledger entry that maps a design-assets channel attachment to the Square_Meters icon image.
questions: What image format and dimensions does Square_Meters have?
Is Square_Meters a raster or vector icon?
Who added the attachment and for what specific purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended as an attachment ledger entry, and its actual content is exactly that: minimal metadata linking to an image asset.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register an image attachment in the design-assets channel so the Square_Meters icon can be discovered and referenced within the channel memory system.
novelty: References an image asset via a custom image:// URI rather than a filesystem path.
contribution: Provides a persistent, identifiable record that associates the design-assets channel with the Square_Meters icon image, enabling lookup and referencing of the asset by attachment id and target URI.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record for the design-assets channel that links attachment id att-7d8d6eba to the image asset at image://design-assets/icons/Square_Meters and records its creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This record was created to catalog an image attachment so the Square_Meters icon can be tracked and retrieved within the design-assets channel.
